findings.description: Using validated CLI avoids shell differences and schema issues.
findings.title: Prefer learn:list-profiles over shell globbing in learn:profile
findings.suggested_issue: Replace with ccw learn:list-profiles --json and render.

findings.description: Docs interpolate ids and paths into shell commands without consistent quoting.
findings.title: Escape/quote all interpolated args (defense in depth)
findings.suggested_issue: Introduce quoteArg() helper and apply consistently.

findings.description: Inline JSON-in-shell is fragile (quotes, length limits).
findings.title: Use file-based payloads for large JSON/profiles
findings.suggested_issue: Add data-file option and adopt in docs.

findings.description: Without recovery, crashes can block learn commands.
findings.title: Stale-lock recovery should be built into CLI
findings.suggested_issue: Add stale-lock cleanup and/or a learn:unlock command.
